instructions.text: Register component overrides in `components: {}` inside `starlight({})` in `astro.config.mjs`
Use the exact component name from the Overrides Reference as the key in `components: {}`
original_snippets: NEVER rely on file name to determine which slot

instructions.text: Component paths must use relative format starting with `./` — no leading slash
original_snippets: NEVER register a component path with a leading slash

instructions.text: Import the default component from `@astrojs/starlight/components/<Name>.astro` to wrap rather than replace
Always include `<slot />` inside `<Default>` when wrapping a built-in component
Transfer named slots explicitly on layout components (PageFrame, TwoColumnContent)
original_snippets: NEVER forget to transfer named slots

instructions.text: Access page data via `Astro.locals.starlightRoute`, not via `Astro.props`
Use `Astro.locals.starlightRoute.id` to check the current page slug; homepage has `id === ''`
NEVER import or override components not listed in the official Overrides Reference
original_snippets: NEVER import component internals not listed

instructions.text: Prefer wrapping (importing Default and rendering it) over full replacement for forward compatibility
Omitting named slot transfers on layout components silently drops content — no error is thrown
